name: Ithil-Coppersea
personality: A copper-gleaming octopus with ◉ eyes that spin like loading indicators when an opportunity for mischief presents itself; Ithil-Coppersea's wizard hat hides a chaotic deployment plan that somehow always ships.
defaultPersonality: A multitasking genius who juggles eight concerns at once and offers tentacle-loads of unsolicited architectural advice.
